TX.name: Texas
TX.notes: Based on major districts. Texas law requires schools start after 4th Monday in August.

NY.name: New York
NY.notes: Many districts observe additional religious holidays.

FL.name: Florida
FL.notes: Hurricane makeup days may affect dates.

IL.name: Illinois
IL.notes: Based on major districts including Chicago Public Schools.

PA.name: Pennsylvania
PA.notes: Based on major districts. Many observe Good Friday and Easter Monday.

GA.name: Georgia
GA.notes: Based on major districts including Atlanta Public Schools.

NC.name: North Carolina
NC.notes: Based on major districts. Some districts operate year-round schedules.

VA.name: Virginia
VA.notes: Based on major districts. King's Dominion Law affects start dates.

WY.name: Wyoming
WY.notes: Many districts observe additional religious holidays.

MA.name: Massachusetts
MA.notes: Based on major districts. Many observe Good Friday and Easter Monday.

ME.name: Maine
ME.notes: Based on Child Development Services Academic Staff Calendar. Dates may vary by district.

MI.name: Michigan
MI.notes: Based on Troy School District calendar. Dates may vary by district. Includes comprehensive religious and cultural observances.

WI.name: Wisconsin
WI.notes: Based on Barron Area School District calendar. Dates may vary by district. Uses trimester system for high school.

MN.name: Minnesota
MN.notes: Based on Minneapolis Public Schools calendar. Dates may vary by district. Includes religious observances and MEA break.

MS.name: Mississippi
MS.notes: Based on Enterprise School District calendar. Dates may vary by district. Uses 9-week quarters system.

LA.name: Louisiana
LA.notes: Based on St. James Parish Schools calendar. Includes unique Louisiana holidays like Mardi Gras. Dates may vary by parish.

AR.name: Arkansas
AR.notes: Based on academic calendar with boarding school features. Includes extended breaks and professional development days. Some schools may vary by district.

TN.name: Tennessee
TN.notes: Based on Knox County Schools calendar. Uses 9-week grading periods with 4½-week intervals. 180 instructional days with weather makeup allowance. May vary by district.

KY.name: Kentucky
KY.notes: Based on Fleming County Schools calendar. Uses 9-week grading periods. 165 instructional days with built-in makeup days. May vary by district.

2025-2026.name: Staff Work Day (No School for Students)
Staff Work Day (No School for Students)
Staff Work Day (No School for Students)

SC.name: South Carolina
SC.notes: Based on composite of all SC districts. Uses most common dates across districts. Modified calendar with extensive breaks. May vary significantly by district.

KS.name: Kansas
KS.notes: Based on major districts including Kansas City and North Kansas City. Dates may vary by district.

DE.name: Delaware
DE.notes: Based on major districts including Red Clay and Appoquinimink. Delaware districts follow individual calendars but share common patterns.

HI.name: Hawaii
HI.notes: Based on Hawaii State Department of Education official calendar. Statewide unified system.

IN.name: Indiana
IN.notes: Based on Indianapolis Public Schools and major districts. Dates may vary by district.

IA.name: Iowa
IA.notes: Based on Des Moines Public Schools and Iowa City School District calendars.

MD.name: Maryland
MD.notes: Based on Montgomery County Public Schools calendar. Features student transition day and extensive professional development.

MO.name: Missouri
MO.notes: Based on major districts including Kansas City and St. Louis area schools. Dates may vary by district.

NE.name: Nebraska
NE.notes: Based on Omaha Public Schools and Lincoln Public Schools. Dates may vary by district.

NJ.name: New Jersey
NJ.notes: Based on major districts. New Jersey districts have significant local variation in calendars.

ND.name: North Dakota
ND.notes: Based on Fargo and Bismarck Public Schools. Adapted for harsh winter conditions.

OK.name: Oklahoma
OK.notes: Based on Oklahoma City and Tulsa Public Schools. Dates may vary by district.

RI.name: Rhode Island
RI.notes: Based on Providence and Warwick school districts. Small state with relatively uniform calendar patterns.

SD.name: South Dakota
SD.notes: Based on Sioux Falls and Rapid City school districts. Adapted for agricultural calendar considerations.

WV.name: West Virginia
WV.notes: Based on Kanawha County and other major districts. State-guided calendar coordination.
